'''Erli Prann''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] adventurer, [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]], and [[Scavenger/Legends|scavenger]] who operated during the [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] crisis and later during the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]'s invasion of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].

==Biography==
Following the [[Death/Legends|death]] of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]], Prann gathered a group fellow [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]] and began a very lucrative career as a scavenger. One of his group's first acquisitions was a [[Golan II Space Defense SpaceGun]] and [[Cloaking device/Legends|cloaking device]] from the [[Bilbringi Shipyards]]. Later during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], Prann and his salvagers began "liberating" technology from [[Yuuzhan Vong]] conquered worlds. Prann and his comrades would journey to these worlds and would [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggle]] the contraband off planet before the Yuuzhan Vong could destroy it, often selling it for a high profit.

In the later years of the war, Prann's Golan II Platform was commandeered by [[Galactic Alliance Army|Alliance]] forces in the [[Second Battle of Bilbringi]], which was part of Operation Trinity. During the battle, [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] landed on the station, along with her [[Twin Suns Squadron|Twin Suns squadron]], and was captured by Prann and his band of pirates. With the help of [[Hiksri Jith]], Jaina would usurp Prann and gain control of the Golan defense platform, using it to cover the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance's]] retreat from the Yuuzhan Vong.

==Appearances==
*''[[The New Jedi Order: The Final Prophecy]]'' {{1st}}
